meta.title: Jesse Tremblay — Résumé
meta.description: Professional profile — Jesse Tremblay, Saint-Amable, Quebec.

general.hook: Fully bilingual, comfortable with technology and numbers, I combine administrative rigour, customer-facing experience, and digital self-sufficiency honed in demanding environments.

it.hook: A self-taught problem-solver with a passion for logic and systems, I learn fast, structure information clearly, and help others fix real issues — in person or remotely.

profile.title: Profile
paragraphs: Bilingual professional (French and English) with a strong affinity for mathematics, logic, and computing. I enjoy understanding how things work and finding clear solutions — whether with office tools, hardware, or digital platforms.

My background includes grocery retail (service and operations), administrative support in a family construction business (quotes, professional documents, bookkeeping assistance), and several years of self-employment around competitive gaming and an online presence: streaming, moderation, event planning, and community management.
I am now looking for a stable role where I can apply my service mindset, attention to detail, and technical curiosity — with the energy and discipline you build through performance and teamwork.

office.title: Office & administration
items: Data entry, filing, and administrative follow-up
Preparation of quotes and client binders

digital.title: Digital, media & communities
items: PC fluency: setup, routine troubleshooting, file organization

human.title: Interpersonal & leadership
items: Stress and deadline management (competitive / event settings)
Decision-making and assertiveness in team settings

groupsIt.title: IT emphasis (tech-focused version)
items: Documentation and clear step-by-step guidance for users
Order and structure: backups, naming, folder hierarchies

items.title: Self-employed — competitive gaming & online presence
bullets: Independent activity around competitive gaming: streaming, scheduling, coordination with partners and communities.
Moderation and rule enforcement in high-volume chat environments.
Excel and Word for lightweight operations tracking, planning, and content presentation.
Participation in many tournaments; hands-on help organizing events (light logistics, communication, deadlines).
Current goal: transition to stable employment and predictable income, transferring those habits of rigour and autonomy.

items.title: Grocery clerk
bullets: Stocking, rotation, and compliance with hygiene and food-safety expectations.
Customer service: wayfinding, courtesy, and pace in a fast-moving store.
Teamwork with staff and supervisors to meet priorities and quality standards.
Safe product handling and attention to detail (dates, facing, signage).

items.title: Administrative support (part-time, during studies)
bullets: Bookkeeping assistance: entry, filing, and document tracking.
Quote preparation and client packages with professional formatting on computer.
Consistency and tone for written client communications.
Family business context: confidentiality, versatility, accountability.

items.title: Soccer referee
bullets: Applied league rules, managed timekeeping, and kept matches running smoothly.
Clear communication with players, coaches, and spectators; kept the environment respectful.
Quick decisions under pressure with fairness and integrity on the field.
Punctuality, pre-game preparation, and accountability in a regulated setting.

interests.title: Activities & interests
paragraphs: Soccer enthusiast — regular play to stay active and disciplined.
Video games: strategy, competition, practice, and performance under pressure — transferable to planning and teamwork.
Personal brand online: consistency, professional tone, and thoughtful communication with an audience.
